title: Xtra Indulgent Italian Mushroom Risotto
description: A malty, velvety Italian dish featuring Marsala wine, this risotto is a low-glycemic-friendly indulgence, with a rich flavor profile that will satisfy any craving. This Sicilian-inspired recipe is perfect for special occasions or a cozy night in.

ingredients.name: mixed mushrooms
ingredients.notes: such as cremini, shiitake, and button

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the mixed mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice is coated in oil and slightly toasted.
Add the Marsala wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely absorbed, stirring constantly.
Add 1/2 cup of warmed chicken broth to the rice and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid is mostly absorbed.
Repeat the process of adding the chicken broth in 1/2 cup increments, waiting for it to be absorbed before adding more, until all the broth is used.
When the rice is cooked and creamy, remove from heat and stir in the grated grana padano cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
